violations.text: The floor grout in the ice cream service area near the dipper well is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025

Sour cream was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit on ice. Food placed on ice 2.5 hours prior to inspection. PIC created ice bath to ensure foods were submerged in order to maintain proper temperatures. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2023

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Eggs were placed hot and covered in the flip top prep unit near the ice cream 2 hours prior to inspection. Eggs were uncovered and moved to walk-in cooler to rapidly cool. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2023
